proposal_summary: This proposal establishes and confirms a set of principles for the Uniswap DAO to guide decision-making, which will be published on-chain to the uniswap.eth ENS record upon execution.

disclosed_entities.name: ENS Public Resolver contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: published onchain using the setText function of ENS Public Resolver contract

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the ENS text record for uniswap.eth with the approved DAO Principles.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: On executing the proposal, the Principles will be published onchain using the setText function of ENS Public Resolver contract for the uniswap.eth node.

claimed_complexity.reason: The only on-chain action is updating an ENS text record via a single function call.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: On executing the proposal, the Principles will be published onchain using the setText function of ENS Public Resolver contract

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: published onchain using the setText function of ENS Public Resolver contract

limitations: No precise contract addresses (0x...) are provided in the text for the ENS Public Resolver or the exact target node hash.
